params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a two-entry register file with a clock input. It has a write enable (we) signal that allows writes to occur on the negative clock edge; when enabled, it writes the values of two 32-bit data inputs (wd0 and wd1) into the two registers. The read address (ra) determines which of the two registers is output: if ra is 0, the output is the content of the second register; if ra is 1, it outputs the content of the first register.
